body: Jordan, thanks for sending over the updated deck — I had a chance to dig into it this morning and came away genuinely impressed by how much the unit economics have tightened since we last spoke. The energy efficiency benchmarks you're showing for [NovaMind](company/novamind-ai) at scale are exactly the kind of signal we look for when evaluating AI infrastructure bets at the seed stage. I do want to spend more time on the inference cost projections in section four, since those assumptions will be central to how [Halfway Capital](company/halfway-capital) frames the opportunity internally. Can we carve out 45 minutes this week — Thursday or Friday afternoon works best on my end — to walk through the model together before I bring it to the full partnership? Looking forward to continuing the conversation.
